Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1336_in_Asia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
